name: Madonna
bio: Madonna built one of pop's most durable catalogs, with decades of streaming, sync demand, and global catalog recognition still driving music earnings.
notable_for: Reinvention, massive pop reach, and a catalog that continues to monetize across generations.
career_highlight: Her core singles remain heavily replayed and continue to anchor long-tail catalog value.
revenue_drivers: Global catalog streaming keeps Madonna's biggest singles commercially active.
Sync and fashion or culture-adjacent placements help extend the value of the catalog.
Multi-decade listener familiarity supports long-tail playlist and catalog performance.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from global pop catalog depth, touring halo, sync use, compilation demand, and songwriter participation across key hits.

ownership.master_owner: Mixed major-label master economics across eras with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across Madonna, collaborators, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled artist-side range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
